title: Japanese-Style Crispy Chicken
description: Crispy fried chicken with a spicy kick, inspired by Japanese flavors.
instructions: In a shallow dish, mix together flour, spicy zesty seasoning, and a pinch of salt.
Dredge the chicken pieces in the flour mixture, shaking off excess.
In a separate dish, mix together brazillian panko breadcrumbs and a pinch of salt.
Coat the floured chicken pieces in the breadcrumb mixture, pressing gently to adhere.
Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Fry the coated chicken pieces in batches until golden brown and crispy, about 5-6 minutes per batch.
Drain the fried chicken on paper towels and serve hot.
